'''zhazoso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dochmiac|dochmiac]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-z-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dochmiac|dochmiac]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhazoso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæzeseth|zhæzeseth]] || [[word:zhæzesej|zhæzesej]] || [[word:zhæzesesh|zhæzesesh]] || [[word:zhæzese|zhæzese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhazozosoth|zhazozosoth]] || [[word:zhazozosoj|zhazozosoj]] || [[word:zhazozososh|zhazozososh]] || [[word:zhazozoso|zhazozoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhazosoth|zhazosoth]] || [[word:zhazosoj|zhazosoj]] || [[word:zhazososh|zhazososh]] || [[word:zhazoso|zhazoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhazofsoth|zhazofsoth]] || [[word:zhazofsoj|zhazofsoj]] || [[word:zhazofsosh|zhazofsosh]] || [[word:zhazofsof|zhazofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhazosotho|zhazosotho]] || [[word:zhazosojo|zhazosojo]] || [[word:zhazososho|zhazososho]] || [[word:zhazosoko|zhazosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhazosoth|zhazosoth]] || [[word:zhazosoj|zhazosoj]] || [[word:zhazososh|zhazososh]] || [[word:zhazoso|zhazoso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhazosothol|zhazosothol]] || [[word:zhazosojol|zhazosojol]] || [[word:zhazososhol|zhazososhol]] || [[word:zhazosokol|zhazosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhazosothotho|zhazosothotho]] || [[word:zhazosojojo|zhazosojojo]] || [[word:zhazososhosho|zhazososhosho]] || [[word:zhazosoko|zhazosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhazosothon|zhazosothon]] || [[word:zhazosojon|zhazosojon]] || [[word:zhazososhon|zhazososhon]] || [[word:zhazosokon|zhazosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhazosothoro|zhazosothoro]] || [[word:zhazosojoro|zhazosojoro]] || [[word:zhazososhoro|zhazososhoro]] || [[word:zhazosokoro|zhazosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
